task_name: Two Handed Tie - Knot Tying Instruction

frame_analyses.description: Pink cord wrapped around white cord, hands creating initial loop formation

Hand switching between first and second throw

common_errors_addressed: Demonstrates proper hand crossing technique to avoid slack
Shows correct bilateral hand switching to maintain knot integrity
Illustrates appropriate cord tension throughout formation
Demonstrates complete three-throw sequence rather than incomplete knots

video_summary: This is an instructional/educational video demonstrating the 'Two Handed Tie' knot-tying technique using an Ethicon trainer box. The video uses clear, slow-motion demonstration of hand positioning and cord manipulation across three sequential throws, with explicit focus on bilateral hand coordination and proper hand switching between throws. This is NOT a formal FLS task performance and should not be scored as one.
video_type_rationale: Classified as 'instructional' because: (1) Title slide with educational framing, (2) Slow, deliberate demonstration technique clearly intended for teaching, (3) Multiple camera angles of same knot from different perspectives, (4) Focus on technique clarity rather than speed/efficiency, (5) No timing indicators or performance pressure evident
